descent_implication_certificate.statement: The replayed top-level system proves Collatz descent, and descent implies convergence to 1 by strong induction.

parent_state_coverage_certificate.statement: Every parent-state domain required by the theorem is covered by replayed coverage, residual parent, finite/base, or no-escape certificates.

transition_soundness_certificate.statement: Every transition used by the theorem graph is an exact replayed Collatz/parent-state/debt transition.

universal_entry_certificate.statement: For every positive integer n > 1, even n descends immediately and odd n enters a unique parent state n = 2^a q - 1.

well_founded_ranking_certificate.statement: The closed parent-state transition system has no infinite non-descending path by explicit well-founded ranking.
